name: Bisca Mulan
description: Bisca Mulan is originally from the west, she came to the Fairy Tail Guild as an immigrant and joined up. She was first introduced in chapter 2 and episode 9. name: Bouga
description: **Occupation:** Spy **Affiliation:** Lamplight **Skills:** She is a talented engineer and serves as the resident tech expert, though her inventions have been known to cause mayhem, especially during her time at her old school. Annette is one of the main protagonists in the Spy Classroom series. She has no memories from her past before she join training school, and she became a spy because of her special skills, without even knowing who she was.

name: Eleina
description: Originally from Hong Kong. Although she seems unsociable and is bad at listening to what others say, she is actually a famous hacker under the name "Mad Screamer."

name: Fear Kubrick
nativeName: フィア・キューブリック
description: Fear is the female protagonist of C³. She claims to be a "cursed tool" that has been exposed to so much hatred and negativity that it allowed her to gain a consciousness, and says that she came to Haruaki's home in hopes of purifying her "curse". She's actually a fictitious device called Fear In Cube, a terrible torture device from the Inquisitions. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Hijiri Koganei
description: A wealthy boy who is not in touch with the lives of "peasants", also set up by Riri for Anzu. He meets Anzu in a twist on a classic anime meet cute, where she is running late to school and is hit by his car. He takes her on a date for compensation, assuming she got hit on purpose, and is shocked when she rejects him. He is not used to having girls reject him so he tries to woo Anzu by buying her off.
